## Added

- Fuzzy search input on the Rules page filters rule cards as you type, using substring, subsequence, and Levenshtein matching.

- Rule templates on the new rule form: Move newsletter, Learn spam, Learn ham.

- Training page at `/training` for bulk rspamd Bayes learning from any IMAP folder, with a live progress bar and per-message results table.

## Fixed

- Nav bar icons now align vertically with their text labels.
